news.headline: Avantor (NYSE: AVTR) to report Q4 and full year 2024 earnings on Feb 7, 2025. Leading provider in life sciences.
news.summary: In Radnor, Pennsylvania, on January 10, 2025, Avantor, Inc. (NYSE: AVTR), a prominent worldwide supplier of essential products and services to clients in the life sciences and advanced technology sectors, disclosed plans to unveil its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024.

news.headline: Chemify in Scotland appoints Dr. Alastair Leighton, biopharma expert, as COO.
news.summary: Chemify, a company based in Glasgow, Scotland, has announced the appointment of Dr. Alastair Leighton as its new Chief Operating Officer. Dr. Leighton, a seasoned professional in the biopharmaceutical industry, brings a wealth of experience to his new role. This strategic move is expected to further drive Chemify's growth and development.

news.headline: Global AI in Tourism Market projected to reach $13.38 billion by 2030, growing at 28.7% CAGR. Key players: Snowflake, IBM, NVIDIA. By offering, solutions segment expected to dominate market. High initial costs a restraint. Opportunities for better customer interaction using AI.
news.summary: The global AI in Tourism Market is set to see significant growth, with a projected increase from USD 2.95 billion in 2024 to USD 13.38 billion by 2030 at a CAGR of 28.7%. The market dynamics show a rising adoption of data automation tools and a demand for personalized services, with key players such as Snowflake, IBM, and NVIDIA leading the industry. AI integration in sectors has accelerated with advances in machine learning and natural language processing, making deployment of AI solutions easier. The solutions segment, including tools for booking management, virtual assistants, pricing optimization, and travel itinerary planners, is expected to drive market growth during the forecast period. This information was released in a new research report by MarketsandMarkets™, accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: US recently laid to rest confidence with ex-President Carter.
Axogen reports $49.4M Q4 revenue (up 15.1% from 2023) & $187.3M full-year 2024 revenue (up 17.8%). Cash estimated at $39.5M. CEO pleased with growth. Investor Day on Mar 4, 2025.
news.summary: Axogen, Inc. announced preliminary unaudited fourth quarter and full-year 2024 financials. Their fourth quarter revenue is expected to be $49.4 million, a 15.1% increase over the same period in 2023. Full-year 2024 revenue is projected to be $187.3 million, up 17.8% from 2023. The gross margin for the year is expected to be above 75.5%. Their total cash, cash equivalents, and investments on December 31, 2024, are estimated at $39.5 million, a $2.5 million increase from the previous year. The President and CEO, Michael Dale, expressed satisfaction with the company’s performance and announced an upcoming Investor Day on March 4th, 2025, to share strategic priorities. Further details will be disclosed with the release of full audited results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. Axogen is known for developing surgical solutions for peripheral nerve injuries.

news.headline: Diakonos Oncology will present at Biotech Showcase 2025, featuring proprietary tech for late-stage cancers.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in Houston, Diakonos Oncology, a clinical-stage biotech firm utilizing unique dendritic cell technology to tackle urgent needs in late-stage and aggressive cancers, shared plans to showcase its recent progress.

news.headline: Verismo Therapeutics doses first patient in Phase 1 trial of SynKIR™-310 for B cell Non-Hodgkin Lymphomas.
news.summary: Verismo Therapeutics, a clinical-stage CAR T company, has administered the initial dose to the first patient in their Phase 1 trial assessing SynKIR™-310, a promising new drug candidate targeted towards individuals with relapsed/refractory B cell Non-Hodgkin Lymphomas. This significant milestone was reached on January 10, 2025, in Philadelphia. Verismo Therapeutics specializes in developing innovative KIR-CAR therapies, with this trial indicating a promising advancement in the field.

news.headline: FDA clears Tyra Biosciences for Phase 2 study of TYRA-300 in Non-Muscle Invasive Bladder Cancer, expects first patient in Q2 2025.
news.summary: Tyra Biosciences, Inc. has named urologic oncologist Erik Goluboff, M.D. as Senior Vice President of Clinical Development to oversee non-muscle invasive bladder cancer (NMIBC) initiatives. The company anticipates the first patient to receive treatment in the SURF302 trial in the second quarter of 2025. Based in Carlsbad, California, Tyra Biosciences is a clinical-stage biotechnology firm listed on the Nasdaq under the symbol TYRA.

news.headline: BofA's Consumer Investments hit $500B in assets, nearly 4M accounts with high-tech solutions and thousands of advisors.
news.summary: Bank of America's Consumer Investments business, based in Charlotte, N.C., has expanded to over $500 million. The platform, which provides access to numerous advisors, is aiding nearly 4 million investors in achieving their financial objectives. The innovative investing services offered by the bank have proven to be beneficial for a large number of account holders.

news.headline: Diamond Lake Minerals (OTC: DLMI) buys Solutions™ Naturopathic & SoftWave Acupuncture Clinics in Arizona for nationwide expansion.
news.summary: Diamond Lake Minerals, Inc. (OTC: DLMI) has successfully completed the acquisition of the prestigious Solutions™ Naturopathic & SoftWave Acupuncture Clinics located in Arizona. This acquisition marks a significant move for Diamond Lake Minerals, Inc. as it expands its portfolio in the healthcare sector. The acquisition includes multiple clinics with a notable track record of offering high-quality naturopathic and acupuncture services. The transaction is expected to enhance Diamond Lake Minerals, Inc.'s presence in the healthcare market and boost its revenue streams.

news.headline: Only 11% of polyamorous individuals find media representations accurate, according to 3Fun survey.
news.summary: In a recent survey conducted by the popular dating app 3Fun, it was found that a mere 11% of polyamorous individuals believe that media representations accurately reflect their actual experiences. This statistic underscores the disconnect between how polyamory is depicted in the media and the reality faced by those living this lifestyle. The survey sheds light on the challenges faced by this community in terms of representation and acceptance.

news.headline: Psylo rebrands as Xylo Bio, with key board appointments. Announces breakthrough progress at JPM Healthcare Conference. Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: Xylo Bio, a prominent player in neurotherapeutics discovery and development, revealed significant achievements during the JPM Healthcare Conference in San Francisco on January 10, 2025. Formerly known as Psylo, the company announced its rebranding to Xylo Bio to signal its expanded focus and progress in the field. This change signifies a strategic shift for the organization as it continues to advance in its sector.

news.headline: Trumid reports December 2024 trading highlights, with significant growth in trade volume and user participation.
news.summary: Financial technology company Trumid, a major player in electronic bond trading, recently disclosed its monthly activity and key achievements for the year-end in a press release dated January 10, 2025. During the period under review, the platform experienced significant trade volume, with a total of [insert number] trades executed. Additionally, user participation levels were robust, with a notable [insert number] active users engaged on the platform. The company's performance in the electronic bond trading sector exemplifies its strong market presence and growing traction among investors and traders.

news.headline: ESA achieves key milestones in Virginia's community solar market by 2024, marking impactful growth in Dominion Energy's service territory.
news.summary: Maitland, Florida - On January 10, 2025, ESA, a prominent developer in solar and energy storage, looks back with pride on a successful year in Virginia's active community solar market. The company achieved significant milestones and made a notable impact by creating financeable projects in Dominion Energy's service area.

news.headline: Johnson & Johnson MedTech receives CE Mark approval for Dual Energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH™ SF Catheter.
news.summary: The Dual Energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH™ SF Catheter provides electrophysiologists with a unique feature allowing them to alternate between radiofrequency and pulsed field energy using a single catheter. This capability is supported by the CE Mark and findings from the SmartfIRE study conducted on the catheter. The study demonstrated the efficacy and safety of the Dual Energy THERMOCOOL SMARTTOUCH™ SF Catheter in delivering both types of energy during procedures.

news.headline: Bank of Montreal (TSX: BMO) (NYSE: BMO) sets up ASPP for efficient purchase of Common Shares with broker.
news.summary: Today in Toronto, on January 10, 2025, Bank of Montreal (TSX: BMO) (NYSE: BMO) revealed its initiation of an automatic securities purchase plan ("ASPP") with its broker, BMO Nesbitt Burns Inc. This move aims to streamline the process of repurchasing BMO common shares ("Common Shares"). This decision signifies the bank's proactive approach to enhancing shareholder value through strategic investments. The ASPP, once enacted, will allow Bank of Montreal to acquire a specified number of its own outstanding Common Shares at prevailing market prices through its broker. This calculated move underscores the bank's commitment to bolstering its position in the market and leveraging opportunities for growth.

news.headline: FDA clears CapsoVision's CapsoCam Plus® system for pediatric use, providing gentle, stress-free capsule endoscopy for young patients.
news.summary: A new capsule endoscopy system offering 360° panoramic imaging without any wearable equipment is now accessible for pediatric patients. This system, introduced in SARATOGA, Calif., on January 10, 2025, provides a more gentle and stress-free alternative to standard capsule endoscopy procedures.

news.headline: Barington Capital Group submits proxy statement for Matthews Int'l's 2025 annual meeting, advocating for change due to underperformance and ineffective leadership.
news.summary: A letter has been sent to shareholders detailing Barington Capital's strategy to enhance long-term value creation at Matthews. The plan includes four steps aimed at addressing the company's history of underperforming share prices, inadequate operational execution, poor capital allocation, and excessive spending. Emphasizing the necessity for new directors and a new CEO, the letter stresses the urgency of implementing changes to improve performance.

news.headline: KORE wins award for connected vehicle innovation in 2025 IoT Breakthrough Awards Program - global IoT leader.
news.summary: Esteemed IoT Breakthrough Awards Program has acknowledged outstanding companies and products in the Internet-of-Things industry. The event took place in Atlanta on Jan. 10, 2025. KORE, a renowned global IoT Solutions leader and pioneer in IoT hyperscaling, earned recognition as a top provider of IoT Connectivity and Solutions.

news.headline: Wealth Enhancement acquires Danison & Associates, adding $82 million in assets, bringing total to over $103 billion.
news.summary: Wealth Enhancement has expanded into Ohio with their fourth location, now boasting a total of over $103 billion in client assets. This move was announced on January 10, 2025, by the Minneapolis-based national independent wealth management firm.

news.headline: US FDA, Health Canada, EMA, and Australian TGA authorize Phase 3 study INVINCIBLE-3 for INT230-6 in Metastatic Sarcoma; 23 contracted sites.
news.summary: Regulatory agencies in the US, Canada, Europe, and Australia have approved the Company's worldwide Phase 3 trial (INVINCIBLE-3) for Metastatic Soft Tissue Sarcoma, with a total of 23 sites currently enlisted for the study.

news.headline: Powerfleet (Nasdaq: AIOT) to present at 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on Jan 14th, 2025 at 4:30pmET.
news.summary: Woodcliff Lake, New Jersey - Powerfleet, Inc. revealed today that they are set to present at the upcoming 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference on January 14, 2025, at 4:30 pm Eastern Time. The management team will engage with investors to elaborate on Powerfleet's strategies and initiatives. The event will take place as part of their efforts to showcase their performance and potential growth to stakeholders. This move demonstrates their commitment to transparency and engaging with the investment community.

news.headline: Serna Bio names Scientific Advisory Board with RNA experts, including translation and commercialization specialists.
news.summary: Renowned experts in RNA, translation, and commercialization have joined Serna Bio's Scientific Advisory Board (SAB). The company, a leader in AI-driven drug discovery focusing on RNA-targeting small molecules, revealed this news on January 10, 2025. The SAB comprises a group of distinguished individuals in the field, bringing a wealth of experience and expertise to Serna Bio. This development underscores the company's commitment to innovation and advancement in the medical industry.

news.headline: Regal Rexnord (NYSE: RRX) to release Q4 2024 results on Feb 5, 2025, earnings conference call on Feb 6, 2025.
news.summary: Milwaukee-based Regal Rexnord Corporation (NYSE: RRX) is set to unveil its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 after the market closes on February 5, 2025. Investors can anticipate insights into the company's earnings during a conference call following the release. This announcement was made on January 10, 2025, through a press release.

news.headline: Harbour BioMed licenses Anti-TSLP antibody to Windward Bio; focuses on immunological diseases. Jan 10, 2025.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Harbour BioMed, a leading biopharmaceutical company with headquarters in Cambridge, Mass., Rotterdam, Netherlands, and Shanghai, announced its dedication to developing and marketing innovative antibody therapeutics for immune-oncology. The company, listed under HKEX as 02142, focuses on discovering novel treatments to combat cancer.

news.headline: Spring Break 2025 expected to be costlier than usual, travelers spending more than ever this season, as per Squaremouth.
news.summary: In St. Petersburg, Florida, preparations are underway for the upcoming spring break season of 2025. Students and families are eagerly anticipating the holiday, which is expected to be a bustling and costly travel period. This year, travelers are projected to spend record amounts on their spring break trips, with expenses surpassing previous years. In light of this trend, Squaremouth, a leading travel insurance provider in the country, is gearing up to assist vacationers in ensuring a secure and enjoyable travel experience.

news.headline: 4D Molecular Therapeutics prioritizes 4D-150 in Wet AMD & DME, 4D-710 in CF, extends cash runway.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, 4D Molecular Therapeutics based in Emeryville, California revealed their strategic pipeline along with updates on their Phase 3 4FRONT program. The company, listed on Nasdaq as FDMT, indicated a strong focus on genetic medicines to address prevalent diseases. In addition, they provided insights into the initial 4FRONT guidance and revised cash runway guidance, emphasizing their commitment to advancing clinical-stage genetic therapies.

news.headline: CARGO Therapeutics reveals corporate update and upcoming milestones for the year 2025.
4DMT reports positive interim data from DME trial for 4D-150; aligns with FDA on path. Nasdaq: FDMT.
news.summary: 4D Molecular Therapeutics, a genetic medicines company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbols FDMT and 4DMT, shared promising interim results from Part 1 of the SPECTRA clinical trial on Jan. 10, 2025. The trial focuses on assessing the efficacy of their product 4D-150 in treating diabetic macular edema (DME). The company revealed that the data was positive and also announced that they are in agreement with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) regarding the pathway for registering 4D-150 for DME. This news highlights the progress in finding potential treatments for large market diseases.

news.headline: Main Street Financial Services Corp. declares $0.14 per share dividend for Q4 2025, payout on Feb 7 to shareholders of record by Jan 24.
news.summary: In Wooster, Ohio, on January 10, 2025, Main Street Financial Services Corp. announced a cash dividend of $0.14 per share for their common stock. This dividend, declared for the quarter ending December 31, 2025, will be disbursed on February 7, 2025. Shareholders as of January 24, 2025, will be eligible to receive this quarterly cash dividend. Main Street Financial Services Corp. serves as the holding company parent of Main Street Bank Corp. Trading under the ticker symbol OTCQX:MSWV, the Company's dividend declaration reflects its financial performance and commitment to rewarding its investors. (Word count: 87, Characters: 570)

news.headline: Cellebrite to disclose Q4 & FY 2024 results on Feb. 13, 2025, a global leader in Digital Investigative solutions.
news.summary: Cellebrite, a prominent provider of Digital Investigative solutions, is set to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2024 on February 13, 2025. The announcement will come before the market opens on that day. Headquartered in Petah Tikva, Israel, and Tyson's Corner, Virginia, Cellebrite is listed on the NASDAQ stock exchange under the ticker symbol CLBT. This information was disclosed on January 10, 2025, via a press release.

news.headline: Portillo’s appoints industry veteran Jack Hartung to board, accelerating growth efforts.
news.summary: Appointment Strengthens Portillo’s Expansion EffortsPortillo's, a popular restaurant chain, has announced the appointment of a new executive to support its growth. The move aims to strengthen the company's efforts to expand its business operations. With revenue growth reaching XX% last year and plans to open XX new locations in the coming year, this appointment signifies a strategic step towards accelerating Portillo's growth in the competitive food industry market. We can expect to see increased development and presence of Portillo's across various regions in the foreseeable future.

news.headline: Heritage Distilling to accept bitcoin as payment and hold as an asset, aiming to lead in e-commerce industry.
news.summary: This development positions the company as a frontrunner in the craft e-commerce sector by embracing bitcoin as a payment method and incorporating bitcoin as a key asset in its strategy.

news.headline: Barinthus Bio shifts focus to Immunology & Inflammation, provides financial update. Jan 10, 2025, UK & MD. (NASDAQ: BRNS).
news.summary: Barinthus Biotherapeutics plc, based in Oxford, United Kingdom, and Germantown, Maryland, has recently released a strategic business and financial update on January 10, 2025. Operating under the ticker symbol BRNS on the NASDAQ stock exchange, the company, also known as Barinthus Bio, focuses on developing advanced immunotherapeutic treatments. Their innovative approach involves creating novel candidates that direct T cells to effectively manage various diseases.

news.headline: MIND CTI (NasdaqGM: MNDO) to acquire Aurenz GmbH, a provider of UC analytics & call accounting in Germany.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, in YOQNEAM, Israel, MIND C.T.I. LTD. revealed that they have entered into a definitive agreement to purchase Aurenz GmbH. MIND C.T.I. LTD., listed on NasdaqGM as MNDO, is a top provider of prepaid/postpaid billing and customer care solutions for service providers, enterprise UC analytics, and messaging solutions. The acquisition will bolster MIND C.T.I. LTD.'s portfolio with Aurenz GmbH's expertise in UC analytics and call accounting solutions, particularly in Germany. This strategic move signifies MIND C.T.I. LTD.'s continued growth and expansion in the telecommunications sector.

news.headline: Volcon MN1 now available at Cycle Plaza Corpus Christi, TX. Second dealership to receive the unit.
news.summary: Volcon ePowersports, a renowned company listed on NASDAQ as VLCN, disclosed that the Volcon MN1 has made its debut at Cycle Plaza in Corpus Christi, TX on Jan. 10, 2025. This revolutionary model is available for purchase at the dealership, marking the second location to offer the Volcon MN1. The electric vehicle is attracting significant attention and awaiting an excited buyer to take it home.

news.headline: Genius Group boosts Bitcoin Treasury to $35 million, aiming for $120 million, with 372 Bitcoins at $94,047 each.
news.summary: In Singapore on January 10, 2025, Genius Group Limited (NYSE American: GNS) disclosed that it had bolstered its Bitcoin Treasury by acquiring an extra $5 million worth of Bitcoin. This enhanced the total Bitcoin holdings to 372, valued at $35 million. The average price per Bitcoin in this addition was $94,047. Genius Group, a prominent AI-driven education company with a focus on Bitcoin, made this move to fortify its cryptocurrency investments.

news.headline: Character Biosciences partners with Bausch + Lomb to advance treatments for age-related macular degeneration (AMD) in 2024.
news.summary: Character Biosciences, based in Jersey City, New Jersey, has disclosed a recent partnership with Bausch + Lomb, a renowned eye health company. The collaboration, which commenced in 2024, aims to focus on creating advanced therapies for individuals suffering from age-related macular degeneration (AMD). By combining Bausch + Lomb's significant knowledge in ophthalmology with Character Biosciences' comprehensive patient data platform, this venture marks a significant advancement in genetics-guided drug research and development.

news.headline: CODI amends credit agreement with Bank of America on Jan 9, 2025. No specific numbers provided.
news.summary: On January 9, 2025, Compass Diversified Holdings (NYSE: CODI), a company that owns middle market businesses, entered a First Incremental Facility Amendment with Bank of America, N.A. The Amendment was made to its current Credit Agreement, with Bank of America, N.A. serving as the Administrative Agent for the Lenders involved. This update was disclosed on January 10, 2025, in Westport, Connecticut.

news.headline: Leonardo DRS to hold earnings conference call on Feb 20, 2025 for Q4 and full year 2024 results at 10am ET.
news.summary: Arlington-based company Leonardo DRS, Inc. (Nasdaq: DRS) will hold a conference call on Thursday, February 20, 2025, starting at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to go over its fourth-quarter and full-year 2024 performance. Prior to the call, the company will release its quarterly earnings report. The conference call, along with the press release and additional materials, will be live-streamed on Leonardo DRS’s investor relations website.

news.headline: ORYZON will update on corporate progress at international events in Jan-Feb. Clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company.
news.summary: Oryzon Genomics, S.A., a biopharmaceutical company based in Madrid and Cambridge, Mass., revealed on January 10, 2025, that it will provide an overview of its corporate advancements at various global conferences scheduled for January-February. The company, identified by the ISIN Code ES0167733015 and trading as ORY, specializes in utilizing epigenetics for the development of treatments addressing diseases with significant unmet medical requirements.

news.headline: Shake Shack appoints Justin Mennen as Chief Information and Technology Officer, effective Jan 13, 2025, to oversee all tech aspects. CEO Rob Lynch praises Mennen's experience in driving innovation. (Word count: 32)
news.summary: Shake Shack Inc. (NYSE: SHAK) in New York has named Justin Mennen as its new Chief Information and Technology Officer, starting January 13, 2025. Mennen will be reporting to Rob Lynch, Shake Shack's CEO, and will be responsible for all technology-related matters. Lynch praised Mennen's extensive experience in technology leadership and successful innovation in various sectors. This appointment marks an important step for Shake Shack in enhancing its technological capabilities.

news.headline: Hurco reported a net loss of $1.44M in Q4 FY 2024. Sales were $53.7M in the quarter, with a decrease of 19%. Total losses for FY 2024 were $16.6M, with sales of $186.58M, a decrease of 18% compared to FY 2023. Orders were $51.1M for Q4 FY 2024, a 6% decrease, and $198.3M for FY 2024, a 5% decrease. Gross profit was $12.1M in Q4 FY 2024 and $37.7M for FY 2024. Cash and equivalents were $33.33M on October 31, 2024, down from $41.78M in the previous year. Selling, general, and administrative expenses were $12.68M for the quarter and $46.03M for the year.
news.summary: Hurco Companies, Inc. reported a net loss of $1,442,000 for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2024, compared to a net income of $2,422,000 in the same period in fiscal year 2023. For the full fiscal year 2024, they recorded a net loss of $16,608,000, compared to a net income of $4,389,000 in fiscal year 2023. Sales and service fees saw a decrease of 19% in the fourth quarter and 18% for the fiscal year 2024 compared to the previous year. Orders for the fourth quarter decreased by 6%, while for the full year they decreased by 5%. Gross profit percentages also decreased for both periods. The company's cash and cash equivalents decreased from the previous year. Despite challenges, Hurco is focused on order growth and is investing in technology advancements. The company operates globally, with a focus on CNC machine tools for various industries. They face risks related to the economic environment, competition, and technological changes, among others.

news.headline: Evaxion extends plan for ADS ratio change to Jan 14, 2025 - 1 ADS to 50 ordinary shares from 1 ADS to 10 shares.
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark, on January 10, 2025, Evaxion Biotech A/S (NASDAQ: EVAX) revealed a modification to its forthcoming ratio change for American Depositary Shares (ADSs). Currently, one (1) ADS represents ten (10) ordinary shares of DKK 1 nominal value. The new adjustment will see one (1) ADS now equating to fifty (50) ordinary shares instead. Evaxion, known for its AI-Immunology™ powered vaccine development, shared this update as part of its strategic plans.

news.headline: Enveda names Jason Kim as new CFO with 20 years of biopharmaceutical experience, to lead financial strategy.
news.summary: A biotechnology company, Enveda, based in Boulder, Colorado, has appointed Jason Kim as its Chief Financial Officer (CFO). With over 20 years of experience in biopharmaceutical corporate development and financial leadership, Mr. Kim will be responsible for managing Enveda’s financial strategy and operations. The company aims to leverage AI to create new medicines and Mr. Kim's expertise is expected to drive the company's growth as it progresses with the development of innovative therapies.

news.headline: Savers Value Village announces a 5.0% increase in Q4 net sales to $402.0 million; participates in the ICR Conference.
news.summary: Bellevue-based Savers Value Village, Inc. (NYSE: SVV) revealed its preliminary financial results for the thirteen-week period ending December 28, 2024, and the fifty-two-week period ending December 28, 2024. During the fourth quarter, the company reported a 5.0% rise in net sales, reaching $402.0 million. These figures were released as part of its engagement at the ICR Conference held from January 13-15, 2025. Please note that the provided information is preliminary and subject to auditing.

news.headline: Galectin Therapeutics to present NAVIGATE trial results at 2025 MASH-TAG Conference, top-line results in MASH cirrhosis. Executives to host meetings in San Francisco during JP Morgan Healthcare Conference.
news.summary: NORCROSS, Georgia - On January 10, 2025, Galectin Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ: GALT), a company specializing in therapies targeting galectin proteins, revealed that the top-line findings of the NAVIGATE trial for patients with MASH cirrhosis and portal hypertension will be unveiled at the 2025 MASH-TAG Conference from January 9-11, 2025 in Park City, Utah. Furthermore, the company's leadership will be available for private meetings in San Francisco from January 13-16, 2025, coinciding with the JP Morgan Healthcare Conference, to interact with external stakeholders regarding the NAVIGATE trial results and plans for the belapectin program.

news.headline: Michelin: Reveals total voting rights and shares in company's capital.
Arrivo BioVentures reports positive qEEG and BNA™ results on SP-624 for depression and cognition, first targeted for women. SP-624-103 is a promising SIRT6 activator.
news.summary: Arrivo BioVentures, based in Morrisville, North Carolina, shared promising results from its SP-624-103 study. This study assessed the effects of SP-624, a SIRT6 activator with a unique epigenetic mechanism, on neurological pathways. The data revealed potential benefits in treating depression and enhancing cognitive function. This novel treatment could be groundbreaking for females with Major Depression, based on earlier research. The SP-624-103 study, which was double-blind and placebo-controlled, provided significant insights into the therapeutic potential of SP-624.

news.headline: PAR Technology Corporation's CEO will present at Needham Growth Conference on Jan 14, 2025 at 9:30 AM ET. Live webcast available. (Word count: 25)
news.summary: A global foodservice technology company, PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR), headquartered in New Hartford, N.Y., disclosed that their CEO, Savneet Singh, is set to address institutional investors at the 27th Annual Needham Growth Conference at the Lotte New York Palace Hotel. The event is scheduled for January 14, 2025, with a fireside chat at 9:30 AM ET. Those interested can access a live webcast and a replay of the chat by visiting PAR Technology’s website.
